name: Tf2_full_length_element_architecture
description: Architecture record for a full-length Tf2 element. Each ~4.9 kb element consists of 5' LTR (~350 bp) - 5' UTR with PBS - gag-pol polyprotein ORF (encoding capsid, protease, RT, integrase) - 3' UTR with PPT - 3' LTR (~350 bp). Two LTRs are >99% identical at the time of insertion (used for age estimation by LTR divergence). Full-length elements are the source of solo-LTR recombination products and provide the homology that drives Tf2 family expansion.

architecture.internal_structure: 4900 bp dispersed unit; LTR 350 bp where applicable
